query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') as img1, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[1].imageUrl') as img2 FROM guestSessions WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 3
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') as img1, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[1].imageUrl') as img2 FROM guestSessions WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 3
